description: Looks up current inventory exposure for finished products: days_of_cover per (product, component) pair, on-hand units, daily consumption, and the product's monthly revenue. Used by the Assessor and Verifier to quantify how long until a disrupted component stocks out and how much revenue is at risk. Input: product_ids (array of finished-product ids). Returns one row per affected (product, component) pair.

configuration.query:
FROM inventory
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?product_ids, product_id)
| KEEP product_id, product_name, component_id, days_of_cover, on_hand_units, daily_consumption_units, unit, monthly_revenue_usd
| SORT product_id, component_id
| LIMIT 1000

product_ids.description: Finished-product ids to look up exposure for, e.g. ['prd-granola-bar','prd-sparkling-botanical'].
